Deposits
\n \n
    \n

    • \n

    • \n

Smart Deposit Tips
\n
\n
First 2 weeks
Safest window. Use maximum-duration deposits.
\n
Near warzones
Move back to 3-day deposits near end of week 2.
\n
After capture
60-hour cooldown makes fresh 3-day deposits safer.
\n
1-day deposits
Best raw return, worst stacking. Use only at high risk.
